app.title: Sanatan Sangam
app.description: Experience divine darshan, devotional music, AI-powered spiritual art, personalized blessings & ancient wisdom — all in one sacred app.
app.launchBadge: Launching Soon on Play Store & App Store

hero.title: Where {highlight} Meets You
hero.subtitle: Experience divine darshan, devotional music, AI-powered spiritual art, personalized blessings & ancient wisdom — all in one sacred app.
hero.languages: Available in: Hindi • English • Tamil • Telugu • Kannada • Bengali • Malayalam • Marathi • Odia • Punjabi • Gujarati

features.title: One App for Your Complete Spiritual Journey
features.subtitle: From live temple darshan to AI-powered art — everything you need to deepen your connection with the divine.

darshan.title: Live Darshan
darshan.desc: 50+ temple live streams from across India — darshan anytime, anywhere

divyaChhavi.title: Divya Chhavi
divyaChhavi.desc: AI-powered divine portraits with your favorite deities & gurus

music.title: Devotional Music
music.desc: 200+ ad-free bhajans, aarti, mantras & chalisas for every mood

wishmate.title: Wishmate
wishmate.desc: Personalized AI blessings for birthdays, festivals & special occasions

astro.title: Astro & Panchang
astro.desc: Daily horoscope, Panchang, Kundli & zodiac predictions

tunemate.title: Tunemate
tunemate.desc: Compose your own devotional bhajans with AI — your voice, your bhajan!

sangrah.title: Timeless Wisdom at Your Fingertips
sangrah.subtitle: Explore our curated collection of aartis, chalisas, mantras, festival guides, and Ayurvedic wisdom.

download.title: Begin Your Sacred Journey Today
download.subtitle: Join thousands of devotees experiencing the divine through Sanatan Sangam. Available in 11 Indian languages.

social.title: Stay Connected with Sanatan Sangam
social.subtitle: Follow us for daily spiritual content, updates, and bhajans.

footer.brand: Your complete spiritual companion — live darshan, devotional music, AI sacred art, blessings & more in 11 Indian languages.
